title: nemesia anfracta
intro: Nemesia anfracta, also known as the nemesia or garden nemesia, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae, characterized by its delicate, fragrant flowers and attractive foliage. Traditionally, nemesia anfracta has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and anxiety, due to its sedative and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Nemesia anfracta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
